title: Baby Marrow Tart
excerpt: Ingredients 700 g baby marrows, coarsely grated 250 ml self-raising flour 5 extra-large eggs 125 ml olive oil 1 bunch garlic chives, finely sliced 125 ml mint leaves, finely chopped 250 ml strong cheddar cheese, grated 200 g feta cheese, roughly crumbled salt and freshly ground black pepper 10 – 12 cherry tomatoes, halved Method Put …
html:
Ingredients

  • 700 g baby marrows, coarsely grated
  • 250 ml self-raising flour
  • 5 extra-large eggs
  • 125 ml olive oil
  • 1 bunch garlic chives (garlic chives), finely sliced
  • 125 ml mint leaves, finely chopped
  • 250 ml strong cheddar cheese, grated
  • 200 g feta cheese, roughly crumbled
  • salt and freshly ground black pepper
  • 10 – 12 cherry tomatoes, halved

Method

Put the baby marrows in a colander for 30 minutes to drain, then press thoroughly dry with kitchen paper and place in a large mixing bowl. Sift in the self-raising flour and mix lightly with a fork.

Whisk together the eggs, oil and herbs and add to the baby marrow mixture. Add the cheeses, season to taste and mix lightly.

Pour the mixture into a greased ovenproof tart dish and arrange the cherry tomatoes on top. Bake at 180 ºC for 40 – 50 minutes or until cooked through.

Serves 6 portions with a chop and a little salad or 8 portions as a light meal.

Easy!
